cases.text: John Smith founded Acme Labs near Berlin.
Maria Garcia joined Google outside Madrid.
Sundar Pichai addressed Stanford University yesterday.
Priya Patel relocated to London after Amazon hired her.
Elon Musk opened Tesla offices around Austin.
Amina Yusuf met officials in Toronto on Monday.
Michael Jordan visited Jordan after speaking with Queen Rania.
Apple hired Sam Lee, but the apple pie stayed on the table.
Washington hosted talks in Washington after meeting the Washington Post team.
New York University invited York officials to New York.
Jean-Luc Picard met New York-based reporters at SpaceX headquarters.
Mary-Jane Watson thanked Dr. Stephen Strange in New York City.
The Los Angeles Lakers beat Brooklyn in Los Angeles.
Amazon employees in Brazil studied flooding near the Amazon River.
Jordan Romero thanked Jordan officials during the Jordan conference.
OpenAI invited Ana Maria de Souza to San Francisco.
IBM's Arvind Krishna met Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella.
Barack Obama and Michelle Obama visited the Obama Foundation.
University of California, Berkeley welcomed Berkeley alumni.
